category_sources: source_facts.description says Solidity is a contract-oriented programming language; official docs describe Solidity as a language for smart contracts targeting the EVM.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is solidity; official Solidity language portal and docs use the name Solidity.
docs_sources: Official Solidity documentation is hosted at docs.soliditylang.org and linked from soliditylang.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/argotorg/solidity; per instruction, repo returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a Solidity compiler CLI; official docs describe smart contracts and EVM targeting.
